originalTitle: Live RL dev on Pufferlib w/ Joseph Suarez
title: Redesigning Vec Threading Architecture in PufferLib
summary: Worked on a new architecture for the vectorization threading in PufferLib, switching from per-thread atomic trackers to per-buffer atomic counters for buffer task management. Implemented the new design but encountered a bug likely related to string null termination; basic threading was functional. Also achieved a raw deadlift PR of 405 lbs.
